finding_results.notes: Lena's bodily-ownership result is consolidated into one race-specific formulation tied to the absence of lost time. Kai's wrist motif is varied from tactile pre-race soreness to the in-race seam flaring under load, while the body-autonomy material now escalates toward the earned recovery beat of consciously lifting each foot instead of restating the same ownership slogan.

summary: Revised the chapter's recurring ownership and wrist language so the motifs develop across the race scenes instead of repeating in near-identical formulae.
